primary_remaining_failures: EVT eligibility and decision boundaries are underdeveloped
Evidence retrieval/ranking is off-target and misses landmark EVT trials/guidelines
Procedural detail remains generic rather than M1/device-specific
Post-reperfusion management lacks specific decision support
next_fix: Make thrombectomy imaging review and EVT eligibility/decision-boundary module mandatory and procedure-specific; improve evidence targeting toward landmark LVO/M1 thrombectomy trials and guidelines.
